findings.title: Policy creation → procurement corridor → personnel continuity → commercial deployment is a scored laundering chain with no Clifford hop
findings.observed: Chain spans 4/5 stage categories (policy_creation, procurement_capture, personnel_continuity, commercial_deployment); machine_score 0.52; weakest evidence judgment. It does not create a Clifford hop.
findings.action: Strengthen the weakest stage receipts (e.g. confirm procurement award IDs/amounts/dates) before any UI weight upgrade. Never convert a chain into a hop without a bounded shared-participation surface.
